introSection: Aktium is a steel water roller coaster located at Cinecittà World in Lazio, Rome, Italy. It opened with the park in July 2014.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Aktium is a Mack Rides SuperSplash coaster with two lift hills. It is the longest SuperSplash coaster in the world.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: The ride is themed to Vikings, with many Viking-inspired theming elements around the ride. The ride cars are themed as Viking longboats.

fullText:
Aktium is a steel water roller coaster located at Cinecittà World in Lazio, Rome, Italy. It opened with the park in July 2014.

Aktium is a Mack Rides SuperSplash coaster with two lift hills. It is the longest SuperSplash coaster in the world.

The ride is themed to Vikings, with many Viking-inspired theming elements around the ride. The ride cars are themed as Viking longboats.
